faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in South Ozone Park homes?
faqs.answer: South Ozone Park residents commonly encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally yellow sac spiders. While most are harmless, they can be unsettling and multiply quickly. Our technicians identify the specific species in your home and apply targeted treatments to eliminate them and prevent future infestations.
